rationale: Educ. Code §8.152 governs employment of non-physician mental health professionals by local mental health authorities. It has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A local mental health authority shall employ a non-physician mental health professional to serve as a mental health and substance use resource for school districts
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education/mental health employment statute.
